title: tetranthera causticans
side_effects: Tetranthera causticans can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. Ingesting the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain, while prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can cause liver and kidney damage. Improper use of the plant can also result in headaches, dizziness, and even seizures in severe cases. If not handled with caution, Tetranthera causticans can have devastating consequences on both physical and mental health.
